message:
update(beads): close 3 parent beads, advance editor bead to in_progress

Close bd-2u0.5.10 (mine frankentui references), bd-2u0.5.2 (demo corpus),
and bd-2u0.5.3 (shell UX/navigation) after all child beads completed.
Advance bd-2u0.5.4.1 (rich editor surface) from open to in_progress.

Beads closed:
- bd-2u0.5.10: pattern inventory, mapping, and adoption log landed
- bd-2u0.5.2: coverage matrix, canonical narratives, recovery/stress suite landed
- bd-2u0.5.3: IA, shell, and deep-link state contract landed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.1","title":"Define demo strategy, narrative, and measurable success criteria","description":"## Why this exists
Before implementation, the demo needs explicit audience targeting and measurable success criteria. Without this, feature work drifts toward "cool" instead of "convincing and decision-enabling."

## Scope
- Define user personas and priority demo journeys.
- Translate high-level "amazing" into measurable UX/product outcomes.
- Establish acceptance rubric used by all downstream tracks.

## Deliverables
- Narrative brief with audience-specific value statements.
- Success metrics and a pass/fail rubric.
- Prioritized scope boundary for launch vs stretch.

## Acceptance Evidence
- Written rubric and scenario list are stored in-repo and linked from child beads.
- All downstream beads reference these criteria for validation.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:23.294941757Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-19T04:09:33.515315789Z","closed_at":"2026-03-19T04:09:33.514805314Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","planning","product"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:23.294941757Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":111,"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Dependency rationale: this track exists as an execution lane with explicit upstream blockers and concrete downstream evidence obligations so contributors can act without consulting external planning docs.","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:30Z"}]}

## Subtasks
- Define primary and secondary audience personas.
- Map top 3 workflows per persona.
- Rank workflows by decision impact and demo criticality.

## Evidence
Persona matrix and workflow rankings committed in demo docs/config artifacts.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
